---
id: post-auth-login-token
title: "Generate a login token"
description: "Generate a login token. If the visitor is already logged into a XenForo account, they will not be logged into the specified account. Only available to super user keys."
sidebar_label: "Generate a login token"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/xenforo-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Generate a login token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/auth/login-token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Generate a login token. If the visitor is already logged into a XenForo account, they will not be logged into the specified account. Only available to super user keys.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
